Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures players are using the latest features and fixes in the game.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Modifies how dynamic strings with timestamps are handled in the system.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures more accurate and timely updates for players regarding events and changes.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Uses a faster method to retrieve version information from the repository.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves loading times for players by speeding up version checks.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Reduces the time taken to process and display string timestamps by optimizing string handling.
Changed_Other.purpose: Makes the game interface more responsive and faster when showing time-related information.

Removed_Other.name: DFIntConvexDecompCompressionSelector_Staged
Removed_Other.mechanism: Selects a method for compressing complex shapes in the game.
Removed_Other.purpose: Improves game performance by reducing the size of complex objects, leading to smoother gameplay.
